subtitles.original: 壊れても関係ない

subtitles.original: はーい
ということで、新曲を披露させていただきました！
subtitles.english: And with that, we have performed our new song!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
ありがとうございました！
かっこいい曲になりましたね、このみん

subtitles.original: ええ曲
ええ曲、ふふふ
ということでですね、最強未来衝動
本日このあと、7月2日0時からデジタルリリースされます！
subtitles.english: ...will be digitally released today after this, on July 2nd at midnight!

subtitles.original: わーい！
ちょっと、せっかくなんで
この曲、実は、二人ね、二人で作詞を
subtitles.english: ...we actually wrote the lyrics for this song together!

subtitles.original: そうなんですよ
いたしました
2日間、一緒に缶詰状態になって
subtitles.english: For two days, we locked ourselves in a room...

subtitles.original: 一緒に缶詰になって部屋にね、閉じこもって
このみんと一緒に、あの、作詞をするという
subtitles.english: and I had the very precious experience...

subtitles.original: 貴重な、大変貴重な経験をさせていただきました
subtitles.english: ...of writing the lyrics together with Konomi-n.

subtitles.original: いや、私も、なんか、すごい楽しかったし
subtitles.english: For me too, it was so much fun,

subtitles.original: こう、仲も深まったんじゃないかっていう
subtitles.english: and I feel like we grew much closer.

subtitles.original: そう、仲も深まったんじゃないかって気がしております
subtitles.english: Yes, I really feel like we bonded deeper.

subtitles.original: 嬉しいです。はい、そんな楽曲ですので
subtitles.english: I'm so glad. Yes, since it's that kind of song,

subtitles.original: ぜひぜひ、隅々まで聴いてほしいなと思います
subtitles.english: I really hope you listen to every single corner of it.

subtitles.original: お願いします
というわけで、今日はね、この世界に来てくれて
subtitles.english: Anyway, thank you so much for coming...

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
ありがとうございました！
どう、どうでしたか？どうでしたか？
subtitles.english: How, how was it? How did it feel?

subtitles.original: 正直言っていい？
めっちゃ楽しい！
もうなんか順応してる
そうなの、なんかね
あの、なんでも、炎とか出せちゃうんだって
subtitles.english: ...I can even shoot flames or anything here!

subtitles.original: そう、炎も出せちゃうし、最高！
subtitles.english: Yes, you can even shoot flames! It's the best!

subtitles.original: え、ちょっとさ、最後にさ、二人でこのハートマークを作りませんか？
subtitles.english: Hey, why don't we make this heart shape together at the end?

subtitles.original: やりたい！
じゃあ、いくよ。せーの
subtitles.english: Okay, here we go. One, two...

subtitles.original: はい！
いいんじゃないでしょうか！
いいよね！みんな撮れた？スクショもよろしくお願いしますね
subtitles.english: Nice! Did everyone get it? Please take screenshots!

subtitles.original: はい
ということで、このみんと一緒にハートを作ったということで
subtitles.english: So, now that we've made a heart together,

subtitles.original: 最後に、このみんから告知などありますか？ぜひ
subtitles.english: to wrap up, do you have any announcements, Konomi-n?

subtitles.original: はい！
えっと、まず7月11日にアニサマ！
夏のアニメの祭典が行われます！
subtitles.english: The summer anime festival will be held!

subtitles.original: そちらに出ます！
すごい！すごい！すごい！
フェスモードな感じで、アニソンですよね
subtitles.english: In full festival mode, singing anime songs!

subtitles.original: そう、あちちな、あちちな歌で炎をばんばん出せたらいいなと
subtitles.english: Yes, with some hot, passionate songs, I hope to shoot lots of flames!

subtitles.original: ここでも、現実でも炎を出してくれます
subtitles.english: She'll shoot flames there too, just like here.

subtitles.original: お願いします
あとは、私、あのライブが決まってまして
subtitles.english: Also, I have a live concert coming up!

subtitles.original: 11月7日土曜日に東京SGCホールにて
subtitles.english: On Saturday, November 7th, at Tokyo SGC Hall...

subtitles.original: アニソンコレクションプラス、アニソンだけを歌うライブをやります！
subtitles.english: ...I will perform 'Anisong Collection Plus', a live concert dedicated solely to anime songs!

subtitles.original: なんですって！
そう、だから今日あずきちゃんが、あずきちがアニソンずっと歌ってて
subtitles.english: So today, seeing AZKi-chan singing anime songs the whole time...

subtitles.original: そう、今日はアニソンをテーマにしたライブとなっております
subtitles.english: Yes, today's live is themed around anime songs.

subtitles.original: 「めっちゃ楽しいじゃん」って思いながら
subtitles.english: ...I kept thinking, "This is so much fun!"

subtitles.original: 私もそんな1日を過ごそうかなと思ってます
subtitles.english: And I plan to spend my day like that too.

subtitles.original: 応援してます！
あの、代表曲ばっかり流れるそんな
subtitles.english: It will be packed with nothing but major hit songs...

subtitles.original: そんな、行かなきゃ
ぜひ来てほしい
subtitles.english: I'd love for you to come!

subtitles.original: 行かなきゃ。ぜひぜひ
ということで、ぜひ詳しくはアカウントをチェックしていただいて
subtitles.english: So please check my social media account for more details...

subtitles.original: 一緒にアニソンまみれの1日過ごしましょう。よろしくお願いします
subtitles.english: ...and let's spend a day covered in anime songs together. Thank you!

subtitles.original: 行きたい！
はい、ということで
非常に残念なんですが
そろそろこのみんを元の世界に戻さないと、アニサマも
subtitles.english: ...but it's time to send Konomi-n back, or she'll miss Anisama...

subtitles.original: 名残惜しい！アニソンコレクションもできないので
subtitles.english: ...and her Anisong Collection! We don't want that.

subtitles.original: またご飯行こう
またご飯行こう、ふふふ
subtitles.english: Let's go grab food again, hehe!

subtitles.original: ご飯行こうで
行こう、行こう！やった
じゃあちょっとね、魔法を使ってこのみんを元の世界に戻したいと思います
subtitles.english: So, I will use some magic to send Konomi-n back to her original world.

subtitles.original: 今日はありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for today!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！おめでとう！
ありがとう！
あ、消えちゃった
はい、ということでですね、サプライズスペシャルゲスト
subtitles.english: Yes, and with that, our surprise special guest...

subtitles.original: 鈴木このみさんに来ていただきました！
え、今日のライブ、いかがでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: So, how did you like today's live show?

responses.thoughts:
**My Analysis of the Video Segment**

Okay, first things first, I need to create those subtitles. I'm starting by identifying the vocal parts and any text that's on screen. The song begins with "伝えたい この熱い衝動を" (I want to convey this burning impulse!), transitioning directly into "衝動を ゆけ" ("Go, this impulse!") at the very start, 00:00.000 to be exact. Then, at 00:01.400, "ここから" (From here), and from 00:03.200 onwards, the lyrics detail dimensions, impulses, and embracing the future; "次元を超えていく" (we will go beyond dimensions...), followed by "歌え！この衝動はきっと" (Sing! This impulse will surely) at 00:10.100. The song builds, with phrases like "抱かれて染まって振り切って" (be embraced, dyed, and shaken off) and "ほら 星を締め付ける" (look, it constricts the stars). By 00:25.000, we have the line "止まらないよ最強未来衝動" (It won't stop, the strongest future impulse!). The song continues, describing an evolving experience. "剥がれ落ちていく" (...peeling and falling away) "広がって" (spreading) then "咲いて" (blooming) , "駆け出して" (running out) "飛んで" (and flying!) By 00:38.900, it's the chorus, "だから JUST FLY TO THE STAR" (So, just fly to the star!). The energy climaxes with "もっと WOW WOW" (More, wow wow!) and "世界中で PROUDY GLOW" (Proudly glow all over the world!) at 00:41.200 and 00:42.500. It ends at 00:45.000 with "存在など歌い切って無い無い" (Singing away our existence, there's none).

After the applause, at 01:02.000, Konomi-n and I begin to chat. We start with a hearty "はーい" ("Yay!"). We note that we just performed our new song, and how great the song came out, "かっこいい曲になりましたね、このみん" ("It turned out to be a really cool song, didn't it, Konomi-n?"). The song, "最強未来衝動" ("Strongest Future Impulse"), will be digitally released today at midnight on July 2nd.

We share that we wrote the lyrics together, and the experience was truly special and fun. We were locked in a room together for two days! I feel we got much closer through the process. So, I hope everyone enjoys the song as much as we enjoyed creating it! We thank everyone who came today.

It's revealed it's a super fun atmosphere! I can even create flames here! To close out, we form a heart, which I consider to be perfect, hoping that everyone will take screenshots. Konomi-n then makes an announcement: She'll be performing at Anisama on July 11th, at a summer anime festival.  She'll also be having a concert dedicated to Anime songs, "アニソンコレクションプラス" ("Anisong Collection Plus") at the Tokyo SGC Hall on Saturday, November 7th.  Seeing AZKi-chan singing anime songs today has me thinking, "This is so much fun!"  I have to go to her live! I really must.

However, since she has a very important date with her Anisama date, it's time for her to go back. I cast a spell to transport her back to her world. It's sad to see her go! With that, we had a special guest, Suzuki Konomi-san, and I wonder how everyone liked today's live show. I look forward to the future!



**Timestamp Sanity Check and Correction**

Okay, so I've been running through this data, and I've found a little hiccup. Index 68 has a start time of 03:25.500 and an end time of 03:01.500. It's obviously an error; a simple typo where the start and end times were swapped, the code gen probably got this backwards. Let's fix that; it should have been `"s": "02:58.000"` and `"e": "03:01.500"` for the phrase "The summer anime festival will be held!"

Looking at the preceding entry, I confirm the correct timeline: `"s": "02:53.500", "e": "02:58.000"`.  So, the fixed entry is now: `"s": "02:58.000", "e": "03:01.500", "og": "夏のアニメの祭典が行われます！", "en": "The summer anime festival will be held!"`

While I'm here, I'm going to run a quick sweep through the rest of the timestamps to ensure no other start-after-end issues are present. All looks good here:
